data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate whether the approval requirements are returned in the preview, as specified in the requirement. While the linked use case indicates that one booking requires manager approval, it does not explicitly confirm that this approval requirement is included in the preview response. The evidence does not provide a clear indication that the approval requirements are part of the structured response, leading to a gap in fulfilling the requirement.
gaps: Approval requirements are not explicitly confirmed to be included in the preview response.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
